name: mcm-cli

metadata.name: mcm-cli
metadata.summary: A command-line interface for Moloco Commerde Media

documentation:
# Moloco Commerce Media (MCM) CLI utility

This tool is a command-line interface for the Moloco Commerce Media Platform, formerly known as the Retail Media Platform.

Please contact the Moloco representative for more details.

## How to install

To install, run:
```
pip install mcm-cli
```

For installation from the source code, use:
```
git clone https://github.com/moloco-mcm/mcm-cli.git && pip install mcm-cli
```

## How to upgrade

To upgrade, run:
```
pip install --upgrade mcm-cli
```

Or, if installed from the source code:
```
git -C mcm-cli pull && pip install mcm-cli
```

## How to uninstall

To uninstall, run:
```
pip uninstall mcm-cli
```

## How to use
Initialize the configuration with:
```
mcm config init
```
This saves the configuration to `~/.mcm/config.toml`.

For more details on each command, use the `--help` option.
```
$ mcm --help

 Usage: mcm [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                      │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ account    Ad account management                                 │
│ auth       Authentication management                             │
│ config     Configurations                                        │
│ decision   Decision command                                      │
│ version    Show the tool version                                 │
│ wallet     Wallet management                                     │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

$
```

documentation: List the wallet balances of all of the ad accounts

functions.name: mcmcli.command.admin.block_item
documentation:
Item Kill Switch Command.
This API immediately blocks an item or an ad account item from appearing in ads by marking it as “blocked.”

functions.name: mcmcli.command.config.init
documentation:
The tool sets up the configuration file ~/.mcm/config.toml if it does not already exist.
By default, it creates the "default" profile.
To specify a different profile name, use the --profile option.
To save your GitHub token, run the following command:
`mcm config init --profile shared`

functions.name: mcmcli.command.config.list
documentation:
This command lists the profile name, decision api, managmement api, event api,
decision api key, event api key, admin email and password.
It will be retrieved from the ~/.mcm/config.toml

functions.name: mcmcli.command.config.list_profiles
documentation: To list all your profile names, use the `mcm config list-profiles` command.

functions.name: mcmcli.command.account.bulk_invite_ad_account_owners
documentation:
Send campaign manager invitation emails to ad account owners. Ensure the CSV file has three columns:
ad account ID, user email address, and user name. Extra columns are ignored.

functions.name: mcmcli.command.account.bulk_check_user_registrations
documentation: Check user status. Ensure the CSV file has two columns: ad account ID and user email address. Extra columns are ignored.

functions.name: mcmcli.command.account.delete_user
documentation:
Delete the email user. It will send the notification email to the user by default.
Please use the `--no-email-notification` option if you want to skip it.

functions.name: mcmcli.command.account.invite_user
documentation:
Invite a user as an ad account owner. The process creates the ad account if it doesn’t exist
and sends an invitation email to the user.

functions.name: mcmcli.command.account.list_accounts
documentation: List all ad accounts on the platform.

functions.name: mcmcli.command.account.list_account_items
documentation: List all items for a given ad account.
